सिमित 獧ारा संचािलत 琈कए जाएंगे । 9. 灹ितिनयुि猴 灹ितिनयुि猴 灹ितिनयुि猴 灹ितिनयुि猴 क琉 क琉 क琉 क琉 अविध अविध अविध अविध.—(1) 灹ितिनयुि猴 क琉 अविध, िजसके अंतग榁त के瀈灶ीय सरकार के उसी या 琈कसी अ瀈य संगठन या िवभाग म犆 इस िजसने अपने पित या अपनी प獠ी के जीिवत रहते 牣ए 琈कसी 玐ि猴 से िववाह 琈कया है, उ猴 पद犘 म犆 से 琈कसी पर िनयुि猴 का पा灴 नह牷 होगा : 12.... आ आ आ आवास वास वास वास.—व琇र玙 लेखाकार उन पद犘 पर तैनात क犆灶ीय सरकार के त瀄瀡थानी छूट और अ瀈य 琇रयायत犘 पर 灹भाव नह牷 डालेगी, िजनका के瀈灶ीय सरकार 獧ारा इस संबंध म犆 समय-समय पर िनकाले गए आदेश犘 के अनुसार अनुसूिचत जाितय犘, अनुसूिचत जनजाितय犘, अ瀈य िपछड़े वग猀 और अ瀈य िवशेष 灹वग榁 के 玐ि猴य犘 के िलए उपबंध करना अपेि楹त है। 14. सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈 सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈 सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈 सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈.—अिधकरण के अिधका琇रय犘 और अ瀈य कम榁चा琇रय犘 क琉 सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈, वेतन, िविन琖द玗 उपबंध犘 को उपल瀑ध नह牷 कराया गया है, समय-समय पर ऐसे िनयम犘 को िविनयिमत 琈कया जाएगा, उन 瀡थान犘 पर आि瀡थत के瀈灶ीय सरकार के त瀄समान वेतनमान, यथाि瀡थित, समूह क, समूह ख और समूह ग से संबंिधत अिधका琇रय犘 और कम榁चा琇रय犘 पर लागू होगी । ““““अनुसूची अनुसूची the 26th June, 2018 G.S.R. 58 G.S.R. 58 G.S.R. 58 G.S.R. 589999(E (E (E (E). ).). ).— — — —In exercise of powers conferred by clause (h) of sub-section (2) of section 35, read with section 12 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement Short title and commencement Short title and commencement Short title and commencement....— — — —(1) These rules may be called the National Green Tribunal (Recruitment, Salaries and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of Senior Accountant) Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. -- 5 of 10 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 2. Definitions Definitions Definitions Definitions....— — — — (1) In these rules, unless the context otherwise requires, - (a) “Act” means the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010); (b) “Schedule” means the Schedule annexed to these rules; (c) “section” means a section of the Act; (d) “Selection Committee” means the Selection Committee referred to in clause (d) of rule 7; (e) “Senior Accountant” means the personnel recruited under these rules; (f) words and expressions used in these rules and not defined, but defined in the Act, shall have the meanings respectively assigned to them in the Act 3. Application Application Application Application....— — — —These rules shall apply to the post of Senior Accountant (except personnel hired on outsourced basis or on short-term contract basis or on lump-sum salary basis). 4. Appointing Authority Appointing Authority Appointing Authority Appointing Authority....— — — —The Chairperson shall be the appointing authority for the Senior Accountant. 5. Number of post, classification and level in pay matrix Number of post, classification and level in pay matrix Number of post, classification and level in pay matrix Number of post, classification and level in pay matrix....— — — —The number of the said post, its classification and level in the pay matrix attached thereto shall be as specified in columns (2) to (4) of the Schedule. 6. Method of recruitment, age limit, qua Method of recruitment, age limit, qua Method of recruitment, age limit, qua Method of recruitment, age limit, qualifications, etc lifications, etc lifications, etc lifications, etc....— — — —The method of recruitment, age limit, qualifications and other matters relating thereto shall be as specified in the columns (5) to (13) of the Schedule. 7. Procedure for direct recruitment Procedure for direct recruitment Procedure for direct recruitment Procedure for direct recruitment....— — — —The following procedure shall be followed for making direct recruitment to the said post, in accordance with the provisions of the Schedule, namely:- (a) the Tribunal shall invite applications for the post through an advertisement on all India basis; (b) all such applications received shall be screened for eligibility by a Screening Committee constituted by the Chairperson; (c) if the number of applications received is large, then the Selection Committee referred to in clause (d) may recommend conduct of a preliminary examination through a professional agency hired on the basis of an open competitive bid process; (d) the recruitment shall be done by the Selection Committee comprising of- (i) Chairperson or a Judicial Member nominated by the Chairperson – Chairman; (ii) Secretary, Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change or his nominee – Member; (iii) Expert Member to be nominated by the Chairperson – Member; (iv) Registrar of the Tribunal- Member. -- 6 of 10 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 8. Appointment by deputation Appointment by deputation Appointment by deputation Appointment by deputation....— — — —The following procedure shall be adopted for making appointment on deputation to the post, in accordance with the provisions of the Schedule, namely:- (a) the Tribunal shall invite applications for the vacant posts through an advertisement on all India basis; (b) the applications received shall be screened for eligibility by a Screening Committee constituted by the Chairperson; (c) interviews shall be conducted for selection by the Selection Committee as specified by the Chairperson in consultation with the Secretary, Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change referred to in clause (d) of rule 7. 9. Period of deputation Period of deputation Period of deputation Period of deputation....— — — —(1)The period of deputation including the period of deputation in another ex-cadre post held immediately preceding this appointment in the same or some other organisation or Department of the Central Government shall be three years from the date of beginning of the deputation and beyond three years, the period of deputation may be extended upto 4th year with the approval of the Secretary, Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, and beyond 4th year and upto 7th year with the approval of the Minister for Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change: Provided that every extension shall have prior concurrence of the Chairperson. (2) The instructions on deputation issued, from time to time, by the Department of Personnel and Training shall be applicable to officials serving on deputation basis. 10. Conditions of service Conditions of service Conditions of service Conditions of service....— — — —The conditions of service of Senior Accountant in matters of pay, allowances, leave, provident fund, age of superannuation, pension and retirement benefits, medical facilities and other conditions of service, shall be regulated in accordance with such rules and regulations as are for the time being applicable to employees belonging to Group B of the corresponding level in the pay matrix of the Central Government stationed at those places. 11. Disqualification Disqualification Disqualification Disqualification....— — — —No person,- (a) who has entered into or contracted a marriage with a person having a spouse living; or (b) who having a spouse living, has entered into or contracted a marriage with any person, shall be eligible for appointment to the said post. 12. Accommodation Accommodation Accommodation Accommodation....— — — —The Senior Accountant shall be eligible for House Rent Allowance as admissible to employees belonging to Group B of the corresponding level in the pay matrix of the Central Government stationed at those places. 13. Saving Saving Saving Saving....— — — —Nothing in these rules shall affect reservation, relaxation of age limit and other concessions required to be provided to the Scheduled Castes, the Scheduled Tribes, Other -- 7 of 10 -- 8 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Backward Class, ex-serviceman and other special categories of persons in accordance with the orders issued by the Central Government from time to time in this regard. 14. Other conditions of service Other conditions of service Other conditions of service Other conditions of service....— — — —Other conditions of service, including disciplinary proceedings, for which no specific provisions have been provided in these rules, shall be regulated in accordance with such rules as are, from time to time, applicable to employees belonging to Group B of the corresponding level in the pay matrix of the Central Government stationed at those places. Note.---- Vacancies caused by the incumbent being away on deputation or long illness or study leave or under other circumstances for a duration of one year or more may be filled on deputation basis from officers of the Central Government or State Government or Courts or Tribunals. Promotion: Accountant with ten years of service in level 4 (Rs. 25500 -81100) in pay matrix, rendered after appointment thereto on a regular basis in the Tribunal. Note. Note. Note. Note.---- Where juniors who have completed their qualifying or eligibility service are being considered for promotion, their seniors shall also be considered provided they are not short of the requisite qualifying or eligibility service by more than half of such qualifying or eligibility service or two years, whichever is less, and have successfully completed probation period for promotion to the next higher grade along with their juniors who have already completed such qualifying or eligibility service. Deputation: Deputation: Deputation: Deputation: Officers of the Central Government or State Government or Courts or Tribunals,- (a) (i) holding analogous post on regular basis; or (ii) holding the post of Accountant or equivalent post in the Central Government or State Government or Courts or Tribunals, with ten years of regular service in level 4 (Rs. 25500-81100/-) in the pay matrix; and (b) possessing the educational qualification and experience prescribed for direct recruitments under column (7). Note 2. Note 2. Note 2. Note 2.---- Notwithstanding anything contained in rule 9, the period of deputation including the period of deputation in another ex-cadre post held immediately preceding this appointment in the same or some other organisation or Department of the Central Government shall ordinarily not exceed three years. Note 3. Note 3. Note 3. Note 3.---- The maximum age limit for appointment by deputation shall be not exceeding fifty-six years as on the closing date of receipt of applications. [F.
